summary: Comprehensive testing of 3 KORKMAN2 bug fixes: plate setup, weight auto-complete, and admin panel. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Plate setup screen: Shows all 12 registered plates as clickable buttons (DV 10239, DY 84184, EC 25026, EN 80295, DM 13404, DR 30142, DS 78545, DY 84177, EB 64418, EN 80294, EC 66505, BN55130)
Plate setup: Clicking a plate button selects it (red border highlight + value in input field)
Plate setup: Manual input field visible below plate buttons with 'Eller skriv manuelt...' placeholder
Weight entry auto-complete: Entering weight (500) and pressing Enter sets completed=true, on_way=false, time=current
Weight entry: After entering weight, tour row turns GREEN (bg-emerald-100 class added)
Weight entry: Counter updates from '0 færdig' to '1 færdig' after weight submission
Weight entry: Completed tour appears at bottom of list (sorted by completion status)
Admin Overblik panel: Shows 7 stat cards - Total ture (19), Færdig (1), På vej (0), Venter (18), Total kg (500), Pauser (0), Første/Sidste (19:31-19:31)
Admin tour table: Has 8 columns - Fraktion, Modtageanlæg, Adresse, Container, Vægt, Tid, Status, Slet
Admin tour table: Completed tour shows green background (bg-emerald-50) with 'Færdig' badge
Admin tour table: Waiting tours show 'Venter' badge in gray
Admin auto-refresh: Tours refresh every 10 seconds (verified by waiting 12 seconds - data maintained)
No JavaScript console errors during testing
Backend API: All 17 tour workflow tests pass (on_way, weight, completion)
Backend API: Weight auto-complete test passes (weight+completed+on_way+time sent together)
critical_code_review_comments: Line 84-89 App.js: handleWeightSubmit correctly sends {weight, completed:true, on_way:false, time:currentTime} to API
Line 2176-2215 App.js: Setup step 2 shows drivers.map(d => d.plate) as grid of clickable buttons with proper selection styling
Line 806-858 App.js: Admin Overblik panel calculates and displays 7 stats correctly
Line 870-957 App.js: Admin tour table has all 8 required columns with proper sorting (completed at bottom)
Line 349-354 App.js: Admin auto-refresh interval set to 10 seconds using setInterval(fetchAdminTours, 10000)
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data with 12 drivers and 11+ plads. Created test tours for weight auto-complete verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 bug fixes verified: 1) Plate setup shows all registered plates as clickable buttons in 2-column grid + manual input below. 2) Weight entry auto-completes tour (sets completed=true, on_way=false, time=now) - row turns green and moves to bottom. 3) Admin Overblik shows 7 stats + tour table has Vægt/Tid/Status columns + 10-sec auto-refresh. Backend TourUpdate model accepts all Optional fields so frontend can send any combination.
